title: Nectarine and Floral Tea Jelly
description: A delicate British dessert featuring the sweetness of nectarines and the floral taste of silky flowers, set in a tea-infused jelly.
instructions: Combine nectarine and sugar in a saucepan.
Heat the mixture over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
Add floral tea, silk, lemon juice, and water to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a bowl.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate until set, at least 2 hours.
